attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	EORCTA.ORG_ID, 
               EORCTA.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
		EORCTA.TRX_NUMBER, 
		EORCTA.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,
		EORCTA.TRX_DATE, 
		EORCTA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
		EORCTA.REASON_CODE, 
		EORCTA.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
		EORCTA.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER, 
		EORCTA.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
		EORCTA.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, 
		EORCTA.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
		EORCTA.ATTRIBUTE10, 
		EORCTA.REQUEST_ID,
		EORCTA.COMPLETE_FLAG, 
		EORCTA.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
		EORCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1, 
		EORCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT,
		EORCTA.CREATION_DATE, 
		EORCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,
		EORCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11, 
		EORCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9,
		EORCTA.TERM_ID, 
		EORCTA.PURCHASE_ORDER,
		EORCTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
		EORCTA.CREATE_DATETIME,
		EORCTA.BILLTO_LOCATION_NUMBER, 
		EORCTA.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER,
		EORCTA.ACTION_CODE, 
		EORCTA.EXCHANGE_RATE,
		EORCTA.CONVERSION_DATE, 
		EORCTA.DEAL_ID 
FROM	
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EORCTA
 
WHERE	EORCTA.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NATT.SS_CODE, SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_KEY,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,
CAST(NATT.SS_CODE AS CHAR(8))  SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE( MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NATT.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
        ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        	AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
	ON (EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
		AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SORCT.ORG_ID
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON NCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = 	SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
	
/* rivijay : Commented as SHIP_TO details are not mandatory to be populated from source,
inner join was causing rec to got to exception if SHIP_TO details are null from source

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER =SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_SHIP.SS_LOCATION_NUM = 	SORCT.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_SHIP.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='SHIP_TO')
*/
		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM = SORCT.BILLTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   NABS
	ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =NABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =NABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NATT.SS_CODE   =NABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME='OOD')
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMATRX
			WHERE SMATRX.SS_CODE = NATT.SS_CODE
			AND SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID)

SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_NUMBER AS VARCHAR(20)) BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,CAST(NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE AS VARCHAR(3)) BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,CAST(NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE AS VARCHAR(50))
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' OR NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DM' THEN 'CMDM' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'INVOICE' END AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE
,SORCT.TRX_DATE AR_TRX_DATETIME
,CAST(SORCT.REASON_CODE AS VARCHAR(30)) AR_TRX_REASON_CODE
,SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG
,CAST(SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE AS VARCHAR(15)) BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,CAST(SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER AS VARCHAR(50)) RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,CAST(SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID AS BIGINT) SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,CAST(SAT.SS_CODE AS CHAR(8)) SS_CODE
,CAST(SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT AS VARCHAR(30))
,COALESCE (SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-8888) SALES_ORDER_KEY
,CAST(EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME AS VARCHAR(15))
,SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_DATE AS DATE) DV_AR_TRX_DT
,CASE WHEN CAST(SORCT.REQUEST_ID AS BIGINT) IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,SORCT.ACTION_CODE
 ,'I' DML_TYPE,
 CAST(coalesce(SORCT.EXCHANGE_RATE,0.000000) AS DECIMAL(26,18))   RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT,
coalesce(SORCT.CONVERSION_DATE,current_timestamp(0)) RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_DT,
'Y' as OOD_TRX_ROLE,
CAST(COALESCE(SORCT.DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS VARCHAR(50)) BK_DEAL_ID /*Modified as part of  Q3FY14_OOD_ENHANCEMENTS*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SORCT
/* ADDED JOIN WITH  EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL   TO GET SS_CODE  */ 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL	ELOHA
ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EORCT
ON SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD')
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
        ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        	AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
 ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
 AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SORCT.ORG_ID
 AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE    
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON NCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = 	SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER =SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_SHIP.SS_LOCATION_NUM = 	SORCT.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_SHIP.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='SHIP_TO')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM = SORCT.BILLTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
	ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
	ON (SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1
				AND ELOHA.SS_CODE = SO.SS_CODE /* REMOVING HARDCODED VALUE SO.SS_CODE='BV' */)

UNION ALL

SELECT
SAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.TRX_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' OR NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='DM' THEN 'CMDM' WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN 'INVOICE' END AR_TRX_CLASS_TYPE
,SORCT.TRX_DATE AR_TRX_DATETIME
,SORCT.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_REASON_CODE
,SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG AR_TRX_COMPLETE_FLAG
,SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
,SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER RU_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER
,CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' THEN 'CREDIT MEMO' ELSE 'DEBIT MEMO' END RU_AR_CMDM_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE
,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NECALU_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,SAT_ADJ.AR_TRX_KEY RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,SAT.SS_CODE SS_CODE
,SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT
,COALESCE (SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-8888) SALES_ORDER_KEY
,EAPT.BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME 
,SABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
,CAST(SORCT.TRX_DATE AS DATE) DV_AR_TRX_DT
,CASE WHEN SORCT.REQUEST_ID IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,SORCT.ACTION_CODE
 ,'I' DML_TYPE,
 coalesce(SORCT.EXCHANGE_RATE,0.000000)   RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_RT,
coalesce(SORCT.EXCHANGE_DATE,current_timestamp(0)) RU_TRXNL_TO_USD_CONVERSION_DT,
'Y' as OOD_TRX_ROLE,
COALESCE(SORCT.DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') BK_DEAL_ID /*Modified as part of  Q3FY14_OOD_ENHANCEMENTS*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SORCT
/* ADDED JOIN WITH  EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL   TO GET SS_CODE  */ 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL	ELOHA
ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EORCT
ON SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID=EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SAT.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	ON (SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD')
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
        ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        	AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
 ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
 AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SORCT.ORG_ID
 AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE    
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON NCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = 	SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER =SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_SHIP.SS_LOCATION_NUM = 	SORCT.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_SHIP.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='SHIP_TO')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM = SORCT.BILL_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO')
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
	ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE   =SABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME='OOD')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER SO
	ON (SO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   = SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1
				AND ELOHA.SS_CODE = SO.SS_CODE /* REMOVING HARDCODED VALUE SO.SS_CODE='BV' */)

SELECT
SORCT.ORG_ID,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCT.TRX_NUMBER,
SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID,
SORCT.TRX_DATE,
SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID,
SORCT.REASON_CODE,
SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER, 
SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER, 
SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER,
SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
SORCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
SORCT.ATTRIBUTE10,
SORCT.REQUEST_ID,
SORCT.COMPLETE_FLAG,
SORCT.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT,
SORCT.CREATION_DATE,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11,
SORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9,
SORCT.TERM_ID,
SORCT.PURCHASE_ORDER,
SORCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SORCT.CREATE_DATETIME,
SORCT.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SORCT.BILLTO_LOCATION_NUMBER,
SORCT.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER,
SORCT.EXCHANGE_RATE,
SORCT.CONVERSION_DATE,
SORCT.DEAL_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SORCT,
(SEL * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD') NSSC	
WHERE (
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT, $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
	WHERE SORCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD'
	AND NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
    AND NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SORCT.ORG_ID
AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE    )
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	WHERE SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
/* RIVIJAY : commented as SHIP_TO details are not mandatory to be populated from source	
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	WHERE NECALU_SHIP.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER= 	SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
AND NECALU_SHIP.SS_LOCATION_NUM= 	SORCT.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
AND NECALU_SHIP.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='SHIP_TO'
)
 */
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
WHERE NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER= 	SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM= 	SORCT.BILLTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO'
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
	WHERE SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = SABS.SS_CD 
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   NABS
	WHERE SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = NABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      = NABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = NABS.SS_CD 
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	WHERE (CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END ) = EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NSTCA
	WHERE NSTCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
	)
)

SELECT EOFRCTA.ATTRIBUTE10                   
,EOFRCTA.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,EOFRCTA.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,EOFRCTA.BILL_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER       
,EOFRCTA.CREATION_DATE                 
,EOFRCTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,EOFRCTA.COMPLETE_FLAG                 
,EOFRCTA.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,EOFRCTA.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID              
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1   
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10  
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11  
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9   
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT      
,EOFRCTA.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         
,EOFRCTA.INVOICING_RULE_ID             
,EOFRCTA.ORG_ID                        
,EOFRCTA.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      
,EOFRCTA.PURCHASE_ORDER                
,EOFRCTA.REASON_CODE                   
,EOFRCTA.REQUEST_ID                    
,EOFRCTA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,EOFRCTA.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,EOFRCTA.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER       
,EOFRCTA.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,EOFRCTA.TERM_ID                       
,EOFRCTA.TRX_DATE                      
,EOFRCTA.TRX_NUMBER                    
,EOFRCTA.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE6   
,EOFRCTA.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,EOFRCTA.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,EOFRCTA.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,EOFRCTA.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,EOFRCTA.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,EOFRCTA.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,EOFRCTA.DEAL_ID                       
,EOFRCTA.SPLIT_KEY                     
,EOFRCTA.CREATE_DATETIME               
,EOFRCTA.ACTION_CODE                   
FROM	
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL EOFRCTA
 
WHERE	EOFRCTA.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT SOFRCT.ATTRIBUTE10                   
,SOFRCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID               
,SOFRCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,SOFRCT.BILL_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER       
,SOFRCT.CREATION_DATE                 
,SOFRCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SOFRCT.COMPLETE_FLAG                 
,SOFRCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,SOFRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID              
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE1   
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10  
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE11  
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE9   
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT      
,SOFRCT.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE         
,SOFRCT.INVOICING_RULE_ID             
,SOFRCT.ORG_ID                        
,SOFRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      
,SOFRCT.PURCHASE_ORDER                
,SOFRCT.REASON_CODE                   
,SOFRCT.REQUEST_ID                    
,SOFRCT.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
,SOFRCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,SOFRCT.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER       
,SOFRCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER       
,SOFRCT.TERM_ID                       
,SOFRCT.TRX_DATE                      
,SOFRCT.TRX_NUMBER                    
,SOFRCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE6   
,SOFRCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,SOFRCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           
,SOFRCT.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,SOFRCT.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID           
,SOFRCT.EXCHANGE_RATE                 
,SOFRCT.EXCHANGE_DATE                 
,SOFRCT.DEAL_ID                       
,SOFRCT.SPLIT_KEY                     
,SOFRCT.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SOFRCT.ACTION_CODE
,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SOFRCT,
(SEL * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES WHERE SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD') NSSC	
WHERE (
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
	WHERE NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS 
	( 
	SELECT '1' FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT, $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU,
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
	WHERE SOFRCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD'
	AND NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SOFRCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
    AND NATT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
   AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SOFRCT.ORG_ID
AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE    )
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT_ADJ
	WHERE SAT_ADJ.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCT.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT_ADJ.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)
OR 
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	WHERE SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SOFRCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
	AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	)

OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
WHERE NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER= 	SOFRCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM= 	SOFRCT.BILL_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER       
AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO'
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   SABS
	WHERE SOFRCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = SABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SOFRCT.ORG_ID      = SABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = SABS.SS_CD 
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   NABS
	WHERE SOFRCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID = NABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT
	AND SOFRCT.ORG_ID      = NABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   = NABS.SS_CD 
)
OR 
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	WHERE (CASE WHEN SOFRCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SOFRCT.TERM_ID END ) = EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
OR
NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT '1' FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NSTCA
	WHERE NSTCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER=SOFRCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
	)
)

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NATT.SS_CODE, SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_KEY,
SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT,
NATT.SS_CODE AS SS_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE( MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL SORCT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON(SORCT.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
	AND NCOU.OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD')
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
	ON (NATT.SK_CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID_INT = SORCT.CUST_TRX_TYPE_ID
        AND  NATT.SS_CODE = 'OOD')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NATT.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_TV NFC
        ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        	AND NFC.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
        ON  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY EOOSC
	ON (EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME
		AND EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID=SORCT.ORG_ID
		AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE=NFC.BK_COMPANY_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
	ON NCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = 	SORCT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
	
/* rivijay : Commented as SHIP_TO details are not mandatory to be populated from source,
inner join was causing rec to got to exception if SHIP_TO details are null from source

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
	ON (NECALU_SHIP.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER =SORCT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_SHIP.SS_LOCATION_NUM = 	SORCT.SHIPTO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_SHIP.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='SHIP_TO')
*/
		
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_BILL
	ON (NECALU_BILL.DD_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = SORCT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_NUMBER 
		AND NECALU_BILL.SS_LOCATION_NUM = SORCT.BILL_TO_LOCATION_NUMBER
		AND NECALU_BILL.BK_ERP_CAL_SITE_USE_TYPE  ='BILL_TO')
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE   NABS
	ON (  SORCT.BATCH_SOURCE_ID =NABS.SK_BATCH_SOURCE_ID_INT        
	AND SORCT.ORG_ID      =NABS.SK_ORG_ID_INT                 
	AND NATT.SS_CODE   =NABS.SS_CD  )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_PAYMENT_TERM   EAPT
	ON((CASE WHEN SORCT.TERM_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SORCT.TERM_ID END )=EAPT.SK_PAYMENT_TERM_ID            
	AND EAPT.GLOBAL_NAME='OOD')
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SMATRX
			WHERE SMATRX.SS_CODE = NATT.SS_CODE
			AND SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = SORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID)
